title: Survival Reborn
description: This is a modpack aimed to make survival minecraft more realistic and look very very good.
body:
# About

This pack was designed to completely overhaul the survival aspects of the game, making it both harder and more pleasing.  The primary reason I made this was to completely overhaul the survival experience, but I also found it is amazing for screenshots!  The performance is suprising as well, even with Distant Horizons and bobby enabled!

There is an official server for this pack in the discord as well!

# Mods

Some of the most notable mods are:

- Regions Unexplored, Terrestria, and Nature's Spirit
- ReTerraForged
- WWEE, and Terralith
- Create, and addons
- Ad Astra
- Thin Air, No Tree Chopping, and Homeostatic
- Beatify, and Handcrafted
- EMI, Dynamic Crosshair, and Eating Animations
- Sodium, Lithium, and Iris
- BetterX, and Cinderscapes
- End Remastered, Explorify, and Immersive Structures
- Terralith, and Incendium
- Jade, Music Notifications, and Cat Jam
- Naturalist,Promenade, and Wildlife
- Xaero's Minimap, Wilder Wild, and Universla Ores
- Spelunkery, Supplementaries, and Twigs
- Traveler's Backpack, Things, and Waystones
- Yung's mods, and a few Let's Do mods, and BOMD

Huge shoutout to all the developers who spent time making these amazing mods for free!

# Notes

For ReTerraForged to work, set the world type to default, and click customized than choose a preset.  Reterraforged is in alpha so **IT IS NOT RECOMMEND FOR LONG TERM SURVIVAL WORLDS** instead use the more stable Terra or default world option!

Photon is the recommended shader for this pack!

I will try to update pack at least once a month, but don't expect (or dread!) frequent mod additions, I will only remove a mod if absolutely neccesary as it would ruin old worlds.
